RecordType.description: This is the Administrative Agent Development Property. It is manually created by a staff member.
RecordType.label: Development

NOT FOUND - TRANSFERRED TO MUNI ATTRNY

All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage%2E CGP%26H will provide you a list of lenders%2E Lenders not on this list may not be able to finance mortgages for deed restricted affordable homes%2E

All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage%2E Please contact First Credit Corporation%2C Manufactured Home Finance %26 Insurance regarding financing options at 1-800-562-6036%2C or www%2Efirstcreditcorp%2Ecom%2E

If you are interested in purchasing an affordable home%2C you must be able to secure financing%2E You may work with any lender%2E%C2%A0Buyers have recently worked with Peapack-Gladstone Bank%2C Amaro Pereira%2C %28908%29 334-8789%2C%C2%A0apereira%40pgbank%2Ecom%2E
There is no fee to apply for this program%2E All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage%2E
